product_name: Airbrush Plush Light-Up Cosmic Unicorn with Fortune Teller

bullets: Customize your own cosmic unicorn with colorful airbrushed patterns and designs
choose from 100 stencils and 4 airbrush colors
The ask a question, press the Cosmic Unicorn’s horn to reveal a color, and consult the fortune teller’s guide to translate the answer!
When you’re done designing, wash your unicorn off and begin again!
Includes plush unicorn with light-up fortune teller’s horn, airbrush tool, 4 airbrush colors, 100+ stick-on stencils, plastic gloves, and fortune teller’s guide
content.description: Design your own cosmic unicorn with the Airbrush Plush Cosmic Light Up Unicorn! Choose from 100+ stencils and 4 airbrush colors, position your pattern just where you want it, then use the working airbrush tool to style your furry, fortune-telling friend. Once your design is complete, ask a question, press the unicorn’s horn to reveal a color, and consult the fortune teller’s guide to translate the answer. When you’re done, wash your plush pet, let it dry, and begin again! Includes plush cosmic unicorn with light-up fortune teller’s horn, airbrush tool, 4 airbrush colors, 100+ stick-on stencils, plastic gloves, and fortune teller’s guide

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 plush, 1 airbrush tool, 4 airbrush markers, sticker sheets, plastic gloves, fortune teller's guide
